base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of graveyard_wasteland_tileset — a tile from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Graveyard + Wasteland atlas — tombstones, crypts, dead-grass, poisonous-marsh water, swamp-muck. Used in burial grounds + poison swamps. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Graveyard + Wasteland atlas — tombstones, crypts, dead-grass, poisonous-marsh water, swamp-muck. Used in burial grounds + poison swamps
